summary: Recent updates to the Gecko Media Plugins (GMP) in Firefox focused on enhancing the performance and efficiency of the media handling capabilities of the browser. One significant change involves activating a new performance check using clang-tidy, a tool that helps developers identify areas in the code where improvements can be made, particularly related to copying data in loops. These enhancements are essential as they can lead to smoother playback of media content and a better overall user experience, especially when using features like WebRTC for video calls or streaming services. **Improving media performance will help ensure that users enjoy clearer, more stable media playback without interruptions.**
